title: The Haunted Horrors
description: A scary modpack that adds terrifying entitys/jumpscares to the game.
body:
![warning: viewer discretion advised](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9adb42f266ba8b7e883d879a8966f766fb52c056.webp)
# If you could not see the image above, Viewer Discretion Advised.

![Haunted Horrors Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/730e3234fabfe44902025b6def6807e75f524ca9.png)
This is a VERY TERRIFYING modpack. This scared the heck out of me. The scariest mod in this pack in my opinion is [THE SILENCE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-silence). And the Mojang logo at the beginning is broken because of all the mods. Same with the panorama. The reason this does not include the [Cave Dweller](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cave-dweller) is because that the [Cave Dweller](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cave-dweller) only supports up to 1.19.3 Forge, and this modpack is 1.20.1 Forge. And if you equip the [ERROR422](https://modrinth.com/mod/error422) mod, the game crashes.

The icon is found at [https://shaderpacks.net/insanity-shader/](https://shaderpacks.net/insanity-shader/).

Play at your own risk. Other than that, enjoy.
